channel.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Get the latest updates for popular awesome list

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
Projects

Boilerplate

  • openapi-python-clientstars179 - Generate modern FastAPI Python clients (via FastAPI) from OpenAPI.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

ORMs

  • FastAPIweestars5 - A simple way to create REST API based on PeeWeestars8.3k models.
  • Tortoise ORM - An easy-to-use asyncio ORM (Object Relational Mapper) inspired by Django.
    • FastAPI Example - An example of the Tortoise-ORM FastAPI integration.
    • Tutorial: Setting up Tortoise ORM with FastAPI
    • Aerich - Tortoise ORM migrations tools.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Async SQLAlchemy with FastAPI - Learn how to use SQLAlchemy asynchronously.
  • Running FastAPI applications in production - Use Gunicorn with systemd for production deployments.
  • Streaming video with FastAPI - Learn how to serve video streams.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Admin

  • FastAPI Adminstars619 - Functional admin panel that provides a user interface for performing CRUD operations on your data.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Utils

  • FastAPI Chameleonstars74 - Adds integration of the Chameleon template language to FastAPI.
  • FastAPI Jinjastars35 - Adds integration of the Jinja template language to FastAPI.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

ORMs

  • ormar - Ormar is an async ORM that uses pydantic validation and can be used directly in FastAPI requests and responses so you are left with only one set of models to maintain. Alembic migrations included.
    • FastAPI Example - Using FastAPI with ormar.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Utils

  • OpenTelemetry FastAPI Instrumentation - Library provides automatic and manual instrumentation of FastAPI web frameworks, instrumenting http requests served by applications utilizing the framework.

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • OPAL (Open Policy Administration Layer)stars253 - Real-time authorization updates on top of Open-Policy; built with FastAPI, Typer, and FastAPI WebSocket pub/sub.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    ODMs

  • Beaniestars116 - Asynchronous Python ODM for MongoDB, based on Motor

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Developer Tools

  • FastAPI Code Generatorstars197 - Create a FastAPI app from an OpenAPI file, enabling schema-driven development.

    • Resources

    Courses

  • Modern APIs with FastAPI and Python - A course designed to get you creating new APIs running in the cloud with FastAPI quickly.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Courses

  • Full Web Apps with FastAPI Course - You'll learn to build full web apps with FastAPI, equivalent to what you can do with Flask or Django.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Auth

  • FastAPI Cloud Authstars85 - Simple integration between FastAPI and cloud authentication services (AWS Cognito, Auth0, Firebase Authentication).

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Utils

  • FastAPI Websocket Pub/Substars42 - The classic pub/sub pattern made easily accessible and scalable over the web and across your cloud in realtime.
  • FastAPI Websocket RPCstars22 - RPC (bidirectional JSON RPC) over Websockets made easy, robust, and production ready.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
Projects

Boilerplate

  • inboardstars44 - Docker images to power your FastAPI apps and help you ship faster.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • FastAPI Microservice Patterns - Blog post series with exemplary implementations of microservice patterns.
    • Local Development Environment - Skaffold, docker, kubectl and minikube in a nutshell.
    • Service discovery in Container Orchestration Platforms - Enabling FastAPI service communication in Kubernetes explained.
    • Asynchronous Communication - Enabling loosely coupled services with messaging.
    • Application Monitoring - Application metric monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana.
    • Serverless Deployment - About the current status of the compatibility between FastAPI and Kubernetes-native FaaS platforms.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

ORMs

  • Piccolostars255 - An async ORM and query builder, supporting Postgres and SQLite, with batteries (migrations, security, etc).
    • FastAPI Examplesstars6 - Using FastAPI with Piccolo.
    • Piccolo Adminstars33 - A powerful and modern admin GUI, using the Piccolo ORM.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Deploy a Dockerized FastAPI App to Google Cloud Platform - A short guide to deploying a Dockerized Python app to Google Cloud Platform using Cloud Run and a SQL instance.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Developer Tools

  • FastAPI Profilerstars27 - A FastAPI Middleware of joerick/pyinstrument to check your service performance.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Utils

  • FastAPI Paginationstars75 - Pagination for FastAPI.
  • FastAPI Limiterstars37 - A request rate limiter for FastAPI.

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • Coronavirus-tg-apistars8 - API for tracking the global coronavirus (COVID-19, SARS-CoV-2) outbreak.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Implementing FastAPI Services – Abstraction and Separation of Concerns - FastAPI application and service structure for a more maintainable codebase.

    • Resources

    External Resources

  • TestDriven.io FastAPI - Multiple FastAPI-specific articles that focus on developing and testing production-ready RESTful APIs, serving up machine learning models, and more.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Utils

  • FastAPI MQTTstars45 - An extension for the MQTT protocol.
  • Starlette Contextstars142 - Allows you to store and access the request data anywhere in your project, useful for logging.
  • Starlette OpenTracingstars37 - Opentracing support for Starlette and FastAPI.
  • Starlette Prometheusstars136 - Prometheus integration for FastAPI and Starlette.
  • FastAPI CRUDRouterstars229 - A FastAPI router that automatically creates and documents CRUD routes for your models.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Using Hypothesis and Schemathesis to Test FastAPI - Apply property-based testing to FastAPI.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Utils

  • Prometheus FastAPI Instrumentatorstars88 - A configurable and modular Prometheus Instrumentator for your FastAPI application.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Deploy Machine Learning Models with Keras, FastAPI, Redis and Docker
  • Developing and Testing an Asynchronous API with FastAPI and Pytest - Develop and test an asynchronous API with FastAPI, Postgres, Pytest, and Docker using Test-Driven Development.

    • Resources

    Articles

  • FastAPI has Ruined Flask Forever for Me

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Demystifying Authentication with FastAPI and a Frontend - Add token-based authentication.
  • Introducing FARM Stack - FastAPI, React, and MongoDB - Getting started with a complete FastAPI web application stack.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Utils

  • FastAPI SocketIOstars58 - Easy integration for FastAPI and SocketIO.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Videos

  • FastAPI vs. Django vs. Flask - Which framework is best for Python in 2020? Which uses async/await the best? Which is the fastest?

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • How to monitor your FastAPI service - Explains how to implement Application Performance Monitoring (APM) using OpenTelemetry and Datadog/Jaeger.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Resources

Tutorials

  • Real-time data streaming using FastAPI and WebSockets - Learn how to stream data from FastAPI directly into a real-time chart.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Hosting

Serverless

  • Mangum - Adapter for running ASGI applications with AWS Lambda and API Gateway.
  • Zappastars11.8k

    • Hosting

    PaaS

  • Deta (example)

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Developer Tools

  • Manage FastAPIstars218 - CLI tool for generating and managing FastAPI projects.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Auth

  • FastAPI JWT Authstars179 - JWT auth (based on Flask-JWT-Extendedstars1.1k).

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • Awesome FastAPI Projectsstars196 - Organized list of projects that use FastAPI.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Email

  • FastAPI Mailstars150 - Lightweight mail system for sending emails and attachments (individual and bulk).

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Auth

  • FastAPI Simple Securitystars22 - Out-of-the-box API key security manageable through path operations.
  • FastAPI Usersstars843 - Account management, authentication, authorization.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Hosting

PaaS

  • Heroku (Step-by-step tutorial, ML model on Heroku tutorial)

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • Bitcartstars86 - Platform for merchants, users and developers which offers easy setup and use.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Open Source Projects

  • Universitiesstars35 - API service for obtaining information about +9600 universities worldwide.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • FastAPI for Flask Users - Learn FastAPI with a side-by-side code comparison to Flask.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Utils

  • FastAPI Cachestars116 - A simple lightweight cache system.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Other Tools

  • FastAPI-CamelCase - CamelCase JSON support for FastAPI utilizing Pydantic.
    • CamelCase Models with FastAPI and Pydantic - Accompanying blog post from the author of the extension.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020
item.description:
Third-Party Extensions

Developer Tools

  • msgpack-asgistars58 - Automatic MessagePack content negotiation.

    • Resources

    Official Resources

  • Tutorial - Official tutorial showing you how to use FastAPI with most of its features, step by step.
  • Gitter Chat - Chat with other FastAPI users.

    • Resources

    Podcasts

  • FastAPI on PythonBytes - Nice overview of the project.

    • Resources

    Articles

  • Why we switched from Flask to FastAPI for production machine learning - In-depth look at why you may want to move from Flask to FastAPI.

    • Resources

    Tutorials

  • Deploying Iris Classifications with FastAPI and Docker - Dockerizing a FastAPI application.
  • How to deploy your ConvNet classifier with Keras and FastAPI - Deploy a machine learning model via a web-based API.
  • Introduction to the FastAPI Python Framework - Quick intro to FastAPI.
  • Porting Flask to FastAPI for ML Model Serving - Comparison of Flask vs FastAPI.
  • Serving Machine Learning Models with FastAPI in Python - Use FastAPI to quickly and easily deploy and serve machine learning models in Python as a RESTful API.

    • Resources

    Talks

  • PyConBY 2020: Serve ML models easily with FastAPI - From the talk by Sebastian Ramirez you will learn how to easily build a production-ready web (JSON) API for your ML models with FastAPI, including best practices by default.
  • PyCon UK 2019: FastAPI from the ground up - This talk shows how to build a simple REST API for a database from the ground up using FastAPI.

    • Resources

    Videos

  • Building a Stock Screener with FastAPI - A you build a web-based stock screener with FastAPI, you'll be introduced to many of FastAPI's features, including pydantic models, dependency injection, background tasks, and SQLAlchemy integration.
  • Building Web APIs Using FastAPI - Use FastAPI to build a web application programming interface (RESTful API).
  • FastAPI - A Web Framework for Python - See how to do numeric validations with FastAPI.
  • Serving Machine Learning Models As API with FastAPI - Build a machine learning API with FastAPI.

    • Projects

    Boilerplate

  • FastAPI and Tortoise ORMstars53 - Powerful but simple template for web APIs w/ FastAPI (as web framework) and Tortoise-ORM (for working via database without headache).
  • cookiecutter-fastapistars99 - Cookiecutter template for FastAPI projects using: Machine Learning, Poetry, Azure Pipelines and pytest.
  • FastAPI and React Templatestars578 - Full stack cookiecutter boilerplate using FastAPI, TypeScript, Docker, PostgreSQL, and React.

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • FastAPI Websocket Broadcaststars56 - Websocket 'broadcast' demo.
  • FastAPI with Celery, RabbitMQ, and Redisstars181 - Minimal example utilizing FastAPI and Celery with RabbitMQ for task queue, Redis for Celery backend, and Flower for monitoring the Celery tasks.
  • JSON-RPC Serverstars93 - JSON-RPC server based on FastAPI.
  • redis-streams-fastapi-chatstars56 - A simple Redis Streams backed chat app using Websockets, Asyncio and FastAPI/Starlette.
  • TermPairstars108 - View and control terminals from your browser with end-to-end encryption.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Boilerplate

  • FastAPI Nanostars130 - Simple FastAPI template with factory pattern architecture.
  • Full Stack FastAPI and PostgreSQL - Base Project Generatorstars5.6k - Full stack, modern web application generator, which includes FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Celery, Vue frontend, automatic HTTPS and more (developed by the creator of FastAPI, Sebastián Ramírez).
  • FastAPI Model Server Skeletonstars173 - Skeleton app to serve machine learning models production-ready.
  • cookiecutter-spacy-fastapistars205 - Quick deployments of spaCy models with FastAPI.
  • Pyworkstars5 - Yeoman generator to scaffold a FastAPI app.
  • uvicorn-gunicorn-fastapi-dockerstars1.1k - Docker image with Uvicorn managed by Gunicorn for high-performance FastAPI web applications in Python 3.7 and 3.6 with performance auto-tuning.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Auth

  • FastAPI Authstars47 - Pluggable auth that supports the OAuth2 Password Flow with JWT access and refresh tokens.
  • FastAPI Loginstars155 - Account management and authentication (based on Flask-Loginstars2.8k).
  • FastAPI Permissionsstars144 - Row-level permissions.
  • FastAPI Securitystars17 - Implements authentication and authorization as dependencies in FastAPI.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    ORMs

  • FastAPI SQLAlchemystars263 - Simple integration between FastAPI and SQLAlchemy.
  • GINOstars2.1k - A lightweight asynchronous ORM built on top of SQLAlchemy core for Python asyncio.
    • FastAPI Examplestars228
  • ORMstars1.3k - An async ORM.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Query Builders

  • asyncpgsastars377 - A wrapper around asyncpgstars4.9k for use with SQLAlchemy Core.
  • Databasesstars2.2k - Async SQL query builder that works on top of the SQLAlchemy Core expression language.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Other Tools

  • Pydantic-SQLAlchemystars432 - Convert SQLAlchemy models to Pydantic models.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Developer Tools

  • FastAPI Client Generatorstars161 - Generate a mypy- and IDE-friendly API client from an OpenAPI spec.
  • FastAPI Versioningstars174 - API versioning.
  • Jupyter Notebook REST APIstars27 - Run your Jupyter notebooks as RESTful API endpoints.

    • Third-Party Extensions

    Utils

  • FastAPI Contribstars330 - Opinionated set of utilities: pagination, auth middleware, permissions, custom exception handlers, MongoDB support, and Opentracing middleware.
  • FastAPI Pluginsstars128 - Redis and Scheduler plugins.
  • FastAPI ServiceUtilsstars25 - Generator for creating API services.
  • FastAPI Utilitiesstars683 - Reusable utilities: class-based views, response inferring router, periodic tasks, timing middleware, SQLAlchemy session, OpenAPI spec simplification.
  • Prerender Python Starlettestars14 - Starlette middleware for Prerender.
  • SlowApistars211 - Rate limiter (based on Flask-Limiter).
  • Starlette Exporterstars92 - One more prometheus integration for FastAPI and Starlette.

    • Resources

    Official Resources

  • Documentation - Comprehensive documentation.
  • Source Codestars30.8k - Hosted on GitHub.

    • Resources

    Podcasts

  • Build The Next Generation Of Python Web Applications With FastAPI - In this episode of Podcast Init, the create of FastAPI, Sebastián Ramirez, shares his motivations for building FastAPI and how it works under the hood.

    • Resources

    Courses

  • Test-Driven Development with FastAPI and Docker - Learn how to build, test, and deploy a text summarization microservice with Python, FastAPI, and Docker.

    • Hosting

    Serverless

  • Vercel - (formerly Zeit) (examplestars25).

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • Dispatchstars2.9k - Manage security incidents.
  • Mailerstars19 - Dead-simple mailer micro-service for static websites.
  • Sprites as a servicestars183 - Generate your personal 8-bit avatars using Cellular Automata.
  • Slackersstars35 - Slack webhooks API.

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Open Source Projects

  • RealWorld Example App - mongostars234
  • RealWorld Example App - postgresstars1.1k

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi May 11th - May 17th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

Boilerplate

  • fastapi-gino-arq-uvicornstars228 - Tempate for a high-performance async REST API, in Python. FastAPI + GINO + Arq + Uvicorn (w/ Redis and PostgreSQL).

item.title: mjhea0/awesome-fastapi Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Hosting

PaaS

  • AWS Elastic Beanstalk
  • Google App Engine
  • Microsoft Azure App Service

    • Hosting

    IaaS

  • AWS EC2
  • Google Compute Engine
  • Digital Ocean
  • Linode

    • Hosting

    Serverless

  • Chalicestars7.9k

    • Projects

    Open Source Projects

  • FastAPI CRUD Example:
    • Async flavorstars126
    • Sync Flavorstars31
